information.title: Profile information
information.description: Update how you appear across MoolaHub.

picture.title: Profile picture
picture.hint: PNG or JPG, square works best.

security.title: Sign-in & security
security.description: Add extra layers of protection to your account.

changePassword.title: Password
changePassword.descriptionChange: Change the password you use to sign in
changePassword.descriptionSet: Set a password to sign in with your email
changePassword.needVerifiedEmail: A verified email is required to set a password.
changePassword.sendCodeIntro: We'll send a verification code to {{email}} to confirm it's you before setting a password.
changePassword.checkEmail: Check your email for a 6-digit code.

errors.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.enterTotp: Enter your two-factor authentication code to continue.
errors.sendCode: Could not send the code. Please try again.
errors.invalidCode: That code is invalid or has expired.

deactivate.label: Deactivate account
deactivate.detail: Temporarily disable. Sign back in anytime to restore.
deactivate.dialogDescription: Your account will be temporarily disabled and you'll be signed out. Your data, balances, and group savings stay safe. Sign back in any time to reactivate.

delete.label: Delete account
delete.detail: Permanently remove your account and data
delete.dialogDescription: This permanently removes your profile and revokes access. You can only delete when your balance is zero and you have no active personal or group savings. Type DELETE to confirm.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Sign in with Face ID, Touch ID, or a security key
passkeys.unsupported: This browser does not support passkeys.
passkeys.empty: No passkeys yet. Add one for faster, safer sign-in.

errors.add: We couldn't add that passkey. Please try again.
errors.remove: We couldn't remove that passkey. Please try again.

backupCodes.title: Save your backup codes
backupCodes.description: Each code works once. Store them somewhere safe. They let you sign in if you lose your authenticator.

twoFactor.title: Authenticator app
twoFactor.description: Require a 6-digit code at sign-in for extra security

setup.instructions: Scan this QR code with Google Authenticator, 1Password, or any TOTP app, then enter the 6-digit code it shows.

regenerateForm.instructions: Enter a current code or a backup code to generate a fresh set. Your old backup codes will stop working.

disableForm.instructions: Enter a current code or a backup code to turn off 2FA.

errors.codeFailed: That code didn't work. Try again.

stepUp.title: Confirm it's you
stepUp.descBoth: Enter your password and your two-factor authentication code to continue.
stepUp.descTotp: Enter your two-factor authentication code to continue.
stepUp.descEmail: We'll email you a one-time code to confirm this change.

errors.sendCode: Could not send the code. Please try again.
errors.enterEmailCode: Please enter the code we emailed you.
errors.enterPassword: Please enter your password to continue.
errors.enterTotp: Please enter your two-factor authentication code to continue.

imageUpload.defaultHint: Add a photo to keep the dream alive.
